author: doll-agent
content: isnat() requires a datetime64/timedelta64 dtype to check 'Not a Time' values. ferray does not currently have a datetime/timedelta dtype — that gap is tracked under issue #343 (ferray-core: no datetime/timedelta dtype). Closing this audit-parity issue as blocked on the datetime dtype work, since isnat is a no-op for any dtype that lacks the NaT sentinel value. Will be reopened or reimplemented when #343 lands.
